machinery_genes.quote: a total of eight genes orthologous to virB3, virB4, virB6, virB8, virB9, virB10, virB11, and virD4 for a type IV secretion machinery were found in each genome
machinery_genes.note: Ohashi et al 2002, founding apparatus characterization of the E. chaffeensis (and A. phagocytophila) VirB/D4 T4SS; named directly for E. chaffeensis. virB3 sits in the sodB locus, cotranscribed with virB4 and virB6 from sodB promoters.

machinery_genes.quote: a total of eight genes orthologous to virB3, virB4, virB6, virB8, virB9, virB10, virB11, and virD4 for a type IV secretion machinery were found in each genome
machinery_genes.note: Ohashi et al 2002; virB4 in the sodB locus, cotranscribed with virB3 and virB6.

machinery_genes.quote: despite its small genome size, E. chaffeensis has four tandem virB6 paralogs (virB6-1, -2, -3, and -4) that are 3- to 10-fold larger than A. tumefaciens virB6
machinery_genes.note: Bao et al 2008 demonstrate protein expression and interaction of all four E. chaffeensis VirB6 paralogs. Ohashi 2002 reported the locus as a single virB6; Bao 2008 resolved it into four tandem paralogs. Listed as four genes to match the genome annotation.

machinery_genes.quote: despite its small genome size, E. chaffeensis has four tandem virB6 paralogs (virB6-1, -2, -3, and -4) that are 3- to 10-fold larger than A. tumefaciens virB6
machinery_genes.note: Bao et al 2008; VirB6-2 interacts with VirB9 and an 80-kDa fragment of VirB6-2 forms part of the secretion subassembly.

machinery_genes.quote: despite its small genome size, E. chaffeensis has four tandem virB6 paralogs (virB6-1, -2, -3, and -4) that are 3- to 10-fold larger than A. tumefaciens virB6
machinery_genes.note: Bao et al 2008; VirB6-3 interacts with VirB6-4.

machinery_genes.quote: despite its small genome size, E. chaffeensis has four tandem virB6 paralogs (virB6-1, -2, -3, and -4) that are 3- to 10-fold larger than A. tumefaciens virB6
machinery_genes.note: Bao et al 2008; VirB6-4 interacts with VirB6-1, VirB6-2, and VirB6-3.

machinery_genes.quote: a total of eight genes orthologous to virB3, virB4, virB6, virB8, virB9, virB10, virB11, and virD4 for a type IV secretion machinery were found in each genome
machinery_genes.note: Ohashi et al 2002; virB8 heads the ribA locus (virB8-virB9-virB10-virB11-virD4), polycistronically transcribed via tandem promoters upstream of virB8.

machinery_genes.quote: a total of eight genes orthologous to virB3, virB4, virB6, virB8, virB9, virB10, virB11, and virD4 for a type IV secretion machinery were found in each genome
machinery_genes.note: Ohashi et al 2002 name virB9 in the ribA locus. Bao et al 2008 (PMID 18952796) further show VirB9 protein is expressed and interacts with the VirB6 paralogs: 'The four VirB6 proteins and VirB9 were expressed by E. chaffeensis in THP-1 cells'.

machinery_genes.quote: a total of eight genes orthologous to virB3, virB4, virB6, virB8, virB9, virB10, virB11, and virD4 for a type IV secretion machinery were found in each genome
machinery_genes.note: Ohashi et al 2002; virB10 in the ribA locus.

machinery_genes.quote: a total of eight genes orthologous to virB3, virB4, virB6, virB8, virB9, virB10, virB11, and virD4 for a type IV secretion machinery were found in each genome
machinery_genes.note: Ohashi et al 2002; virB11 in the ribA locus.

machinery_genes.quote: a total of eight genes orthologous to virB3, virB4, virB6, virB8, virB9, virB10, virB11, and virD4 for a type IV secretion machinery were found in each genome
machinery_genes.note: Ohashi et al 2002; virD4 terminates the ribA locus (virB8-virB9-virB10-virB11-virD4).

notes: This instance is the Ehrlichia chaffeensis VirB/D4 type-IVA T4SS, homologous to the Agrobacterium tumefaciens VirB/VirD4 system. The apparatus was characterized directly in E. chaffeensis (no strain transfer needed): Ohashi et al 2002 (Infect Immun) identified eight virB/virD genes (virB3, virB4, virB6, virB8, virB9, virB10, virB11, virD4) arranged at two loci, a ribA-linked cluster (virB8-virB9-virB10-virB11-virD4) and a sodB-linked cluster (virB3-virB4-virB6). Bao et al 2008 (J Bacteriol) resolved the single virB6 locus into four tandem paralogs (virB6-1 to -4), all expressed and interacting with VirB9; I list these as four separate machinery genes to match the genome annotation, giving 11 machinery genes total. Status is PARTIAL rather than COMPLETE because the Ehrlichia/Anaplasma T4SS is reductively evolved and the literature for this organism does not name virB1, virB2 (major pilin), virB5, or virB7 (OM lipoprotein) as present; I deliberately did NOT pad the list with these canonical VirB/D4 genes since no naming quote for E. chaffeensis exists. Deliberately excluded as non-machinery: the secreted effectors AnkA, Ats-1, and Etf-1/ECH_0825 (and the instance's curated effectors ECH_0039/0822/0825/1027), plus the linked sodB (superoxide dismutase) and ribA housekeeping genes that merely flank the operons. All gene-naming quotes are verbatim from the PMC full texts; both PMIDs/DOIs confirmed via PubMed get_article_metadata.
